notes: Vision batch 001: print_mockup_potential=high; best_candidate_tile=center; Clear lakeside property with yard, beach, and shoreline context; no obvious hot tub or pool.
Vision batch 001: print_mockup_potential=low; best_candidate_tile=none; Very blurry and mostly road, trees, and undeveloped land; no clear house or usable backyard crop.
Vision batch 001: print_mockup_potential=medium; best_candidate_tile=other; Center tile is mostly road and driveway; adjacent right-side tiles show better homes and lawns near water.
Vision batch 001: print_mockup_potential=low; best_candidate_tile=center; Blurry residential view with some yard and tree cover, but details are weak for print marketing.
Vision batch 001: print_mockup_potential=medium; best_candidate_tile=center; Center tile includes a visible structure and yard beside a curved road, though resolution is soft.
Vision batch 001: print_mockup_potential=low; best_candidate_tile=none; Center tile is dominated by cul-de-sac pavement with only partial neighboring structures and lawns.
Vision batch 001: print_mockup_potential=low; best_candidate_tile=none; Blurry, mostly wooded or undeveloped view with road frontage; no clear property or backyard feature.

Vision batch 001: print_mockup_potential=medium; best_candidate_tile=other; Wooded acreage setting with partial roofs and yard areas; tree cover obscures the center, and a dark rectangular feature in another tile is ambiguous.
Vision batch 001: print_mockup_potential=medium; best_candidate_tile=center; Center tile shows the home edge, lawn, driveway, and road; somewhat soft but usable for a basic overhead crop.
Vision batch 001: print_mockup_potential=medium; best_candidate_tile=center; Same contact-sheet area as prior image, with partial house and yard visible in center; no obvious pool or hot tub.

Vision batch 002: print_mockup_potential=medium; best_candidate_tile=center; Center tile shows house and yard but imagery is soft; small circular feature may be a tub/pool or yard object. MLS crosscheck batch 001: backyard_photos=yes; drone_or_aerial=no; hot_tub_or_pool=no; best_mls_photos=27,29,30,26,28; Strong backyard/outdoor MLS candidates with deck, lawn, landscaping, mountain views, and rear/side yard context. No visible aerial/drone or hot tub/pool.
Vision batch 002: print_mockup_potential=low; best_candidate_tile=center; Heavily treed lot with obscured yard and blurry imagery; limited usable backyard detail.
Vision batch 002: print_mockup_potential=low; best_candidate_tile=none; Mostly undeveloped or bare lot/road area; no clear backyard amenity.
Vision batch 002: print_mockup_potential=low; best_candidate_tile=none; Wooded rural setting with property mostly hidden by trees; no visible backyard focal point.

Vision batch 002: print_mockup_potential=medium; best_candidate_tile=center; Center/right area shows a lot with yard and structures; possible round feature but not confidently identifiable. MLS crosscheck batch 001: backyard_photos=yes; drone_or_aerial=no; hot_tub_or_pool=no; best_mls_photos=7,8,12,14,3,6,11; Excellent outdoor/waterfront MLS candidates including rear exterior, decks, lake views, dock/marina, shoreline, and wooded setting. No true aerial/drone imagery; lake visible but no pool or hot tub.
Vision batch 002: print_mockup_potential=medium; best_candidate_tile=center; Lakefront property context is attractive, but yard detail is partly obscured by trees and resolution.
Vision batch 002: print_mockup_potential=low; best_candidate_tile=center; Center tile includes house/driveway but backyard is indistinct and image is washed out.
Vision batch 002: print_mockup_potential=low; best_candidate_tile=center; House and lot are visible but very blurry with little usable backyard detail.
Vision batch 002: print_mockup_potential=low; best_candidate_tile=center; Center tile shows driveway/roadside and building edge; backyard not clearly visible.
Vision batch 002: print_mockup_potential=low; best_candidate_tile=none; Mostly bare land/road with no clear residence or backyard amenity in the center tile.
Vision batch 002: print_mockup_potential=low; best_candidate_tile=none; Center tile appears to be vacant or underdeveloped terrain; no usable backyard candidate.
Vision batch 002: print_mockup_potential=low; best_candidate_tile=none; Dense tree canopy dominates center tile; property/backyard is obscured.
Vision batch 002: print_mockup_potential=low; best_candidate_tile=none; Center tile is mainly road intersection/unfinished area; no visible backyard.
Vision batch 002: print_mockup_potential=medium; best_candidate_tile=center; Center tile shows a cleared rural area within trees; no clear house or amenity, but usable open-space context.
Vision batch 002: print_mockup_potential=low; best_candidate_tile=none; Mostly road and vacant/bare lot; house appears only in adjacent tile, not a strong backyard crop.
